textByHashes.00a91d037c991bcedb7083a4922e1c926884a268: Heed my word. Your deeds will not go unthanked.
textByHashes.a9ddd8581d27fb5e9dc7fea7ae898c304cdb0483: You care for this human? How pitiful.
textByHashes.706682fc865e84627109da8ad01374627fe0b090: Worry not. I'll ensure he's fine. He is of good use to me.
textByHashes.7c7d4c6da6b45c52d6e65d53664a993830a01ad4: As for who I am... well. That is of no concern to you, human.
textByHashes.f3eb993cb2b662e98c239f5591f7876890d796f4: YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO KNOW NOTHING. KNOW YOUR PLACE.
textByHashes.532190abcbb16e82d4f2f68bad1e4504c65a1d7c: How adorable. The power of Charos? You truly thought that I could be manipulated by such feeble magic?
textByHashes.1bd438da1cb8b7fe09f4c1df0f5bc674c3d1baba: I'll tell you what, human. Since you tried so hard - I'll tell you my name.
textByHashes.c6e454883c242981d9910338da04d60ce47d02c3: When the time comes, you'll know.
textByHashes.f9a705d820a2085a9386edd7bbd37e94cb3d1947: Right, before I release this humans feeble mind back to consciousness... I am a man of my word. I owe you a reward.
textByHashes.8e029967142cfc71e0e24418654987c6301ac3f6: Tell me, , after speaking to each of the houses... which activities interest you the least? I can give you a small 'boost' of favour in that house.
textByHashes.fa7cb16a623b2ba64604138f976d5662b01b12cb: Very well. The deed is done.
textByHashes.8fa4a87e06aaa188782d0d6fa407cc9cacef4300: You'll find you have gained... Up to 20% favour in . They've decided to 'honour' your efforts in helping me.
textByHashes.c819bdd586d0824ea6274beddfd09200923a702a: Word has spread of my return. The houses are now a little busy in their petty arguments to care about your loyalty. I imagine the speed you now gather favour within all households will be substantially faster.
textByHashes.70424e40beb74b40c86fdc3b2c603ca900c34d20: I can continue to use this human as a conduit for communication. If you need reminding of my rewards, feel free to talk to him and I'll jump in.
textByHashes.0f708a62b6b9b7c0b91fcfd56e830d73c4364bf5: All in good time human. All in good time.
textByHashes.9478e6cd7ba3c88040ad56b211fbaadc1f1c1e14: My influence is currently limited, but it does still exist. I imagine the speed you now gather favour within each house will be substantially faster.
textByHashes.c0076dbd0c90ccd6b362c401e5f261fdeebc688d: You care for him? How kind of you.
textByHashes.3b8b77ec28c6d3020c4a74f3cd6106a6bc61382f: As for who I am... well. That is of no concern to you.
textByHashes.0f58f20640baf0e4767cbc7ed438ae3d8256500c: All in good time. All in good time.
textByHashes.d48c3c071e2dca9fc5a6bc7516138d527511f88a: Now, time to release this ones mind back to consciousness... Don't worry, I'll make sure he rewards you. After all, you've been very useful to me...
textByHashes.92235cdc596b49fd632d37b53a918e7ce08bb34b: You have done well. For that, you have my thanks.
textByHashes.d8c56cb7579526854db74da33bf6cfb778f355b4: You need not fear for him. I will ensure no harm comes his way.
textByHashes.0eaf865719d11b507d9d0c32794e5af67278edcb: As for who I am... Well, that is of no importance.
textByHashes.4cd19cff2beacd930c8cfc88f377ab6f0672c7e4: Knowledge can be a curse. Sometimes, it is better to remain unaware.
textByHashes.88297e4797f5f77a74b5180feda5ce047d3ad47b: Now, time to release this mind back to consciousness... Don't worry, I'll make sure he rewards you. After all, you've been very useful to me...
